titleEn: Ag Tech Talk: Smarter Data, Stronger Relationships
titleZh: Ag Tech Talk：更智能的数据，更牢固的关系
summaryZh: 本文通过Ever.Ag产品与服务副总裁Alan Brady的访谈，探讨AI如何重塑作物投入品销售业务。核心观点是AI将碎片化、交易型的农业零售系统转变为互联、实时的生态系统，使零售商、供应商、农艺师和制造商协同运作。真正的优势不在于更精准的价格预测，而在于更快、更主动的决策能力，帮助企业应对波动、优化库存、保护利润。Brady强调AI通过在最需要的时候提供可操作洞察，强化而非取代行业的关系驱动基础。
featuredReason: 本文揭示了AI在农业供应链中从“预测价格”到“主动决策”的范式转变，其关于AI强化而非取代人际关系的观点，对智慧畜牧行业构建人机协同的数字化生态具有重要参考价值。
contentFull: By AgriBusiness Global Share AI is rapidly rewiring the business of selling crop inputs — and Alan Brady, Vice President of Product and Services at Ever.Ag, says the shift goes far beyond smarter pricing. In this episode of Ag Tech Talk by AgriBusiness Global, Brady explains how embedding AI into ag retail is transforming a fragmented, transactional system into a connected, real-time ecosystem where retailers, suppliers, agronomists, and manufacturers operate in sync. The real advantage isn’t better price prediction; it’s faster, more proactive decision-making that helps businesses navigate volatility, optimize inventory, and protect margins across seasons. Crucially, Brady emphasizes that AI strengthens — not replaces — the industry’s relationship-driven foundation by delivering actionable insights exactly when and where they’re needed most. MORE BY AGRIBUSINESS GLOBAL Digital Farming June 12, 2026 Inside One of America’s Largest Ag Co-Op’s Practical Approach to AI By AgriBusiness Global|June 12, 2026 Digital Farming June 2, 2026 Inside India’s Agricultural Labor Gap: How AgTech Is Digitizing the Farm Workforce By AgriBusiness Global|June 2, 2026 Imagery May 15, 2026 Ag Tech Talk Podcast: EarthDaily on Satellite Data, Crop Monitoring, and Market Transparency By AgriBusiness Global|May 15, 2026 Podcast Transcript: *This is an edited and partial transcript. Top Articles Read More Read More Read More Read More Read More Beyond Disruption: Earning Trust and Driving Impact in AgTech Through Grower-Led Innovation AgriBusiness Global: When you zoom out — especially across crop inputs — how is AI changing the way retailers, agronomists, and suppliers work together? Alan Brady: When you look across the supply chain today, everyone is operating in their own independent systems. What embedding AI does is turn that into a connected, networked ecosystem. Instead of point-in-time handoffs, you get real-time collaboration across retailers, distributors, suppliers, and agronomists. AI allows data to move across those systems, so decisions are driven by shared, real-time insights rather than disconnected processes. ABG: What do AI-driven margin gains actually look like in practice for crop input businesses? AB: The gains don’t really come from predicting prices better — they come from reacting faster and positioning smarter. AI helps you rebalance product mix, optimize logistics, and respond to demand signals in real time. When you can act ahead of market shifts instead of reacting after the fact, that’s where margin improvement happens. It really shifts margin management from reactive to proactive. 0 1 5 Ag Tech Talk: Smarter Data, Stronger Relationships Subscribe Today For Subscribe AgriBusiness Global, a sister publication to PrecisionAg at Meister Media Worldwide, connects the crop input value chain from raw material manufacturers down to distributors and trading partners around the world. See all author stories here. Topics: featured-home
translationZh:
AI正在迅速重塑作物投入品的销售业务——Ever.Ag产品与服务副总裁Alan Brady表示，这一转变远不止于更智能的定价。在本期AgriBusiness Global的Ag Tech Talk节目中，Brady解释了将AI嵌入农业零售如何将一个碎片化、交易型的系统转变为一个互联、实时的生态系统，使零售商、供应商、农艺师和制造商能够同步运作。真正的优势不在于更好的价格预测，而在于更快、更主动的决策，帮助企业应对波动、优化库存并在整个季节中保护利润。至关重要的是，Brady强调，AI通过在最需要的时候提供可操作的洞察，强化——而非取代——行业以关系为基础的核心。

**AgriBusiness Global：** 当你放眼全局——尤其是作物投入品领域——AI正在如何改变零售商、农艺师和供应商之间的协作方式？

**Alan Brady：** 纵观当今的供应链，每个人都在自己独立的系统中运作。嵌入AI的作用就是将其转变为一个互联的网络化生态系统。不再是点对点的交接，而是零售商、分销商、供应商和农艺师之间的实时协作。AI允许数据在这些系统之间流动，因此决策是由共享的、实时的洞察驱动的，而不是由脱节的过程驱动。

**ABG：** 对于作物投入品企业来说，AI驱动的利润增长在实际中是什么样的？

**AB：** 增长实际上并非来自更好地预测价格——而是来自更快的反应和更聪明的定位。AI帮助你重新平衡产品组合、优化物流并实时响应需求信号。当你能够在市场变化之前采取行动，而不是事后应对时，利润改善就发生了。它真正将利润管理从被动转变为主动。
author: Matt Hopkins
contentHtml:
AI is transforming ag retail beyond pricing, connecting retailers, suppliers, and agronomists into a real-time, synchronized ecosystem, says Ever.Ag’s Alan Brady.
The post Ag Tech Talk: Smarter Data, Stronger Relationships appeared first on Global Ag Tech Initiative.
